⚡ Who We Serve

Built for organizations doing
mission-critical work.

We specialize in sectors where operational failure has real consequences — behavioral health, nonprofits, and healthcare. Our solutions are built around the regulatory and operational realities of these industries.

Talk to Us About Your Industry
Primary Industries

Where we do our best work.

These aren't industries we serve occasionally — they're the environments our platforms are designed for from the ground up.

🧠

Behavioral Health

Outpatient mental health centers, psychiatric rehabilitation programs, substance use disorder programs, group homes, and health homes. Our platform is built natively around the regulatory frameworks governing these programs — COMAR, TJC, CARF, and CLH Policy.

Primary Focus
🏥

Healthcare Organizations

Community health organizations, specialty practices, and healthcare nonprofits navigating licensing, compliance documentation, staff training, and HR management. We build the operational infrastructure so clinical staff can focus on care.

Served
🤝

Nonprofits

Mission-driven organizations that need operational support without enterprise overhead. Grant administration, licensing compliance, virtual assistance, and custom platforms built to your scale — not Fortune 500 scale.

Served
🏛️

Government Contractors

Organizations contracting with state and federal agencies requiring documentation management, compliance tracking, procurement support, and reporting infrastructure. We understand the paper trail and build systems that generate it automatically.

Served
👨‍👩‍👧

Social Services

Child welfare, family services, and community-based organizations delivering wraparound services. We help these organizations manage staff, track service delivery, and maintain compliance without drowning in manual documentation.

Served
🎓

Education & Training Organizations

Organizations delivering workforce development, professional training, or continuing education. Our LMS platform supports custom curricula, certification tracking, and compliance reporting for regulated training programs.

Served
Behavioral Health — Deep Dive

We built for this industry from day one.

Behavioral health providers operate under some of the most complex and layered regulatory requirements of any industry. COMAR defines program-specific standards for every service type. TJC and CARF set accreditation benchmarks. CLH Policy governs community-living programs. And all of it changes.

Most software companies treat behavioral health as a vertical. We treat it as a specialty — because our platform was built by someone who has worked inside these organizations, navigated these audits, and understands what breaks at the worst possible moment.

We cover the full continuum: outpatient, residential, crisis, and community-based — with modules designed for each program type's specific documentation and reporting requirements.

  • Outpatient Mental Health Centers (OMHCs)
  • Psychiatric Rehabilitation Programs (PRPs)
  • Substance Use Disorder (SUD) Programs
  • Group Homes and Residential Programs
  • Health Homes and Care Coordination Programs
  • Crisis Stabilization and Respite Programs
  • Day Programs and Partial Hospitalization
  • Community-Based Rehabilitation Services

Don't see your industry listed?

If you're doing mission-critical work and need operational infrastructure that actually fits — get in touch. We'll tell you honestly whether we're the right fit.
